title: Spring Snap Hooks, 304 Stainless Steel Metal Clip Heavy Duty Rope Connector Small Snap Clamp Key Chain Link Buckle for Hammock Swing Set Outdoor Travel Camping Fishing Hiking
features: ✔【Size & Qty】Inside the package is eight m4 mini spring snap hooks. 5/32" clips are 1.6" long, 0.78" wide, 0.15" thick, 0.21" max opening, weigh 0.29oz.

✔【Nicely Made】304 stainless steel spring clips, spring-loaded latch, surface gloss good, do better in high abrasion resistance, resistant to moisture, corrosion resistance, ageing resistance, and long service life.
✔【Sturdy & Durable】Working load: 110 lbs. Broken load: 220 lbs. Rigid structure ensures the stability and strength of clip, and prevents rope escaping or clip uncliping itself.
✔【Easy to Use】You can use it to quickly connect 110 lbs of chains and ropes, tools, accessories, clothing and gear. One hand operation, takes less than 1 second.

✔【Worked Great】5/32" spring clips (m4 snap hooks) work for what you needed! Use for keychain, clips for keys, bottle hook, backpack clip, flag hook, fishing tools fitting, dog leash hook, wire connectors, quick link chain connector, chain link, chain clips, metal clips, rope clips, spring clips fasteners, etc.
description: 🔆Ekunbuy is a company specializing in the production of various series of stainless steel products, our own factory. We offer products in stainless steel which ensure durability, corrosion resistance, high load ratings, and are ideal for outdoor. Spring snap hook, quick link, towing chain, chain, safety rope, eye bolts, tensioner, snap O ring, D ring, fishing pliers, cable railing kit, railing cable protector sleeves etc. We examined all the products carefully before shipment. Glad to be of service, please feel free to contact us anytime. 🔆Why others choose Ekunbuy Spring Snap Hooks? ✔High quality stainless steel ✔Elegant, strong spring snap hook keychain ✔The spring snap hook keychain is not for climbing ✔Multifunctional stainless steel spring snak clip: attach keys, water bottles, camping gear, etc. ✔Ideal spring snap hook keychain for hanging lights, potted plants, garage tools and storage containers. 🔆Material: 304 Stainless Steel 🔆More Size: 1.57 in, 1.97 in, 2.36 in, 3.15 in 🔆Working Load Limit: 1.57 in➖ 110 lbs/50 kg 1.97 in ➖ 176 lbs/80 kg 2.36 in ➖ 265 lbs/120 kg 3.15 in ➖ 441 lbs/200 kg 🔆More Choice: ✔️5/32" 3/16" clips: Keychain, clips for keys, bottle hook, backpack clip, flag hook, fishing tools fitting, dog leash hook, wire connectors, quick link chain connector, chain link, chain clips, metal clips, rope clips, spring clips fasteners, etc. ✔️1/4" clips: Camping hook, swing hook, clothes hooks, keychain, quick link chain connector, etc. ✔️5/16" clips: Camping hook, swing hook, gym clips, clips for hanging chair, hanging punch bag, hanging hammock, etc. 🔆What you get: 8/16/24PCS M4 8/16/24PCS M5 8/16/24Pcs M6 8/16/24Pcs M8 Spring Snap Hook (The Qty & Size you choose)
